message:
fix(security): add exhaustive type check to canPublish authorization

Critical security fix: The canPublish function in WebSocket authorization
was missing the exhaustive type check after its switch statement. Unlike
canSubscribe which properly returns a denial for unknown channel types,
canPublish would return undefined, potentially allowing authorization bypass.

Also includes:
- Dashboard widget update validation (WidgetUpdateSchema)
- Dashboard service fixes for refreshInterval=0 handling
- Cost tracker service improvements
- Handoff transfer service fixes
- Safety service improvements

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
